zh.lifeSummary: Sir John "The Younger" Hynton II是John de Hynton的兒子，於1418年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏金斯頓。他於1435年與Matilda Golaffre結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他於1449年住在英國英格蘭波克夏。他去世於1450年享年32歲。

nameMeanings.name: Hynton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places called Hinton (for example, in Shropshire, Herefordshire, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Hampshire, and Northamptonshire). Some of the placenames, such as those in Northamptonshire, Shropshire, and Herefordshire, derive from Old English hīna, genitive plural form of hīwan ‘household, religious community’, + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’ (compare Hine as the first element). Others, such as those in Gloucestershire, Somerset, and Hampshire, derive from Old English hēan, dative form of hēah ‘high’ + tūn.

variants.name: Hine
meanings: English (Devon): occupational name from Middle English, Old English hīne ‘servant, member of a household’, also ‘farm laborer’ (such as a herdsman or shepherd). Originally a collective term for a body of servants, from an Old English plural noun, hīwan ‘household’, in early modern English it commonly acquired excrescent -d (see Hinde ). Evidence from Nottinghamshire shows that some bearers of the name were wealthy freemen, which suggests that their eponymous ancestors were not farmhands but senior members of a lord's household. From the late 15th century onward in western England, from south to north, a hine or hind also denoted a farm steward or manager, a sense that may be relevant to the surname in northwestern England, where hereditary naming had not been fully established by the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: "The
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a variant spelling of Ty or a transferred use of the surname, a local name for someone who lived by a common pasture, Middle English tye.

nameMeanings.name: Younger"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Northumberland and eastern Scotland): from Middle English yungre ‘younger’, comparative of Young , used to distinguish a younger man from an older man bearing the same personal name (typically, father and son). In one case, at least, however, the name is known to have been borne by an immigrant Fleming, and was probably an Americanized form of Middle Dutch jongheer ‘young nobleman’ (see Jonker ).
Americanized form of various cognate or like-sounding names in other languages, notably German   Junger   and   Junker  , or Dutch   Jonker  .

en.lifeSummary: Sir John "The Younger" Hynton II was born in 1418, in Kingston, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of John de Hynton. He married Matilda Golaffre in 1435. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He lived in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom in 1449. He died in 1450, at the age of 32.

Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il a vécu à Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1449. Il est décédé en 1450, à l’âge de 32 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John "The Younger" Hynton IIは1418年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアキングストンでJohn de Hyntonの息子として生まれた。1435年にMatilda Golaffreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1449年にはイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアに住んでいた。彼は1450年に32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John "The Younger" Hynton II(은)는 1418년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 킨그스턴에서 John de Hynton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1435년 Matilda Golaffre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 1449년도에 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에서 살았다. 그는 1450년 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir John "The Younger" Hynton II родился в 1418 г. в местности кингстон, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали John de Hynton. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Golaffre в 1435 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он жил в местности биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в 1449 году. Он умер в 1450 г. в возрасте 32 лет.
